segments.text: Then Bildad the Shuhite answered and said:
Dominion and fear belong to Him; He makes peace in His high places.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Is there any number to His armies? Upon whom does His light not rise?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: How then can man be righteous before God? Or how can he be pure who is born of a woman?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: If even the moon does not shine, And the stars are not pure in His sight,
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: How much less man, who is a maggot, And a son of man, who is a worm?
segments.speaker: Bildad
